HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LARRY POLLITT'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. LARRY POLLITT HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: TAMARA WILLAT-HARRISON CSR#4609 (D206)
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-06-2008.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-03-2009 CONTINUED TO APR-14-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. DISMISSAL PENDING. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON MAR-03-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
